summary: Bug fix verification for 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading split)' in getRoomColor. All 8 features tested successfully - ZERO runtime crashes with incomplete data.
passed_tests: 1. Vue Réception - Room numbers (101, 102, 103, etc.) displayed correctly - SUCCESS
2. Vue Réception - No 'split' error on undefined data - SUCCESS (0 console errors)
3. Vue Direction - Floor plan by floor (Ét. 1-4) with 40 room chips - SUCCESS
4. Vue Gouvernante - 3 tabs functional (Validation 5, Équipe 4, Stocks 1) - SUCCESS
5. Vue Mobile - 21 tasks with timer (00:02, 00:00) and Terminer buttons - SUCCESS
6. Error Boundary - No crash, page loads correctly - SUCCESS
7. Page refresh - No crash, data reloads correctly - SUCCESS
8. Seed data - 'Données démo' button present and functional - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: getRoomColor (line 73-79) correctly handles null/undefined roomNumber with fallback color
RoomCell component has null check for room prop
StaffAvatar has null check for name prop with fallback '—'
DirectionViewV2 sort (line 457-459) filters rooms with null room_number before sorting
ErrorBoundary properly catches errors and displays user-friendly error page
seed_data_creation: Demo data present: 40 rooms, 21 tasks, 4 active staff, 5 inspections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for 'split' error verified. All null checks in place: getRoomColor, RoomCell, StaffAvatar, DirectionViewV2 sort. ErrorBoundary integrated in App.jsx. All Housekeeping views working: Réception (40 rooms), Direction (floor plan), Gouvernante (3 tabs), Mobile (21 tasks with timer).

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split') in getRoomColor
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added null checks in getRoomColor (line 75-77), RoomCell, StaffAvatar, DirectionViewV2 sort
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - 0 console errors, no crashes on page load or refresh
bug_fix_verification.error_boundary: Integrated in App.jsx, displays user-friendly error page if crash occurs
